Weekly Raid Boss Report

Overview
Start Date 2026-04-27
End Date 2026-05-03
Duration 7 days
File Name raid_boss_20260427_7days.html
Raid - Type Cradle of the Stars
Raid - Max Level Killed 150
Raid - Guild Morale 20,545
Raid - Total Boss Damage 507,632,605
Raid - Total Boss Attacks 104
Raid - Total Participants 22
Name Team CompositionPowerResultBuffs
Pet H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 Team Boss Level Damage User % Total %
NauT

130
130
130

182K184K165K199K161K195K1.09M15016.2M95.21%3.19%
+25%
Dreamer's Retaliation
All heroes on the team deal 25% bonus damage against Nightmares for each Nightmare on the battlefield.
+5%
Sphere Energy Unleashed
Destroying a Defense Sphere grants 5% energy to the hero that deals the final hit.
10
Survivor's Willpower
Defeating a Nightmare generated by Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions grants a 10-second 100% Vampirism aura to the entire team.
7
Chosen by the Stars
After a Meteor Shower, all Healers gain a buff that increases all healing dealt by 100% for the duration of 7 seconds.
-10%
Stellar Tank Resilience
Tank heroes take 10% less damage from Defense Sphere basic attacks.
+20%
Marksman Opportunity
If a Marksman uses their ultimate while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active, they will recover 20% energy over 5 seconds.
7
Immortal Hero
The hero that deals the most damage while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active gains Immortality for 7 seconds.
3
Astral Shield
Triggers an Astral Shield once per battle. The Shield absorbs all damage from Defense Sphere explosions in the Wormhole. The Shield is triggered automatically when 3 or more Defense Spheres enter the Wormhole.
+15%
Resilient Grove Keeper
Grants a permanent buff if there are three Grove Keepers on the team. Each team member has a 15% chance to avoid damage when Defense Spheres collide with the Wormhole.
+10%
Keeper's Blessing
When Osh the Eternal Keeper awakens, the hero that dealt the most damage before the Planet Parade began will gain 10% more stats.

Wakeful Undead
Grants a permanent buff if there are three Undead on the team. Each team member has a 25% chance not to fall asleep while Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is active.

+100%
Meteors of Haste
While Meteor Shower is active, all heroes boost their speed by 100%.
-15%
Wormhole Suppressor
Decreases damage dealt by the Wormhole and Wormhole Generator skills by 15%.
+15%
Defense Sphere Destroyer
Boosts damage dealt to Defense Spheres by 15%.
+25%
Jumpstart
All heroes enter combat with 25% Energy.
-15%
Defense Sphere Override
Weakens the basic attacks of Defense Spheres by 15%.
+25%
Dreamer's Retaliation
All heroes on the team deal 25% bonus damage against Nightmares for each Nightmare on the battlefield.

Sphere Energy Unleashed

Immortal Hero
The hero that deals the most damage while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active gains Immortality for 7 seconds.
3
Astral Shield
Triggers an Astral Shield once per battle. The Shield absorbs all damage from Defense Sphere explosions in the Wormhole. The Shield is triggered automatically when 3 or more Defense Spheres enter the Wormhole.
-50%
Mage's Vigilance
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the Nightmares generated by Mages have 50% less health.
4
Insomnia
A single use of Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions can't unleash more than 4 Nightmares.
+25%
Healing Converter
25% of healing exceeding heroes' max health is converted into pure damage dealt to Defense Spheres.
+10%
Nightmare's Energy
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the hero that generates the Nightmare gains 10% energy for damage dealt to it.
+10%
Keeper's Blessing
When Osh the Eternal Keeper awakens, the hero that dealt the most damage before the Planet Parade began will gain 10% more stats.

130
130
155K79.5K165K122K186K166K873K1604.27M4.41%0.84%
+25%
Jumpstart
All heroes enter combat with 25% Energy.
+100%
Meteors of Haste
While Meteor Shower is active, all heroes boost their speed by 100%.
-9%
Wormhole Suppressor
Decreases damage dealt by the Wormhole and Wormhole Generator skills by 9%.
+5%
Sphere Energy Unleashed
Destroying a Defense Sphere grants 5% energy to the hero that deals the final hit.
+20%
Marksman Opportunity
If a Marksman uses their ultimate while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active, they will recover 20% energy over 5 seconds.
10
Survivor's Willpower
Defeating a Nightmare generated by Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions grants a 10-second 100% Vampirism aura to the entire team.
7
Chosen by the Stars
After a Meteor Shower, all Healers gain a buff that increases all healing dealt by 100% for the duration of 7 seconds.
-10%
Stellar Tank Resilience
Tank heroes take 10% less damage from Defense Sphere basic attacks.
7
Immortal Hero
The hero that deals the most damage while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active gains Immortality for 7 seconds.
3
Astral Shield
Triggers an Astral Shield once per battle. The Shield absorbs all damage from Defense Sphere explosions in the Wormhole. The Shield is triggered automatically when 3 or more Defense Spheres enter the Wormhole.
+25%
Healing Converter
25% of healing exceeding heroes' max health is converted into pure damage dealt to Defense Spheres.
+10%
Keeper's Blessing
When Osh the Eternal Keeper awakens, the hero that dealt the most damage before the Planet Parade began will gain 10% more stats.
4
Insomnia
A single use of Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions can't unleash more than 4 Nightmares.
+25%
Dreamer's Retaliation
All heroes on the team deal 25% bonus damage against Nightmares for each Nightmare on the battlefield.
Anophelus0000004.53M097M019.11%

Defense Sphere Override
Weakens the basic attacks of Defense Spheres by 9%.

+5%
Sphere Energy Unleashed
Destroying a Defense Sphere grants 5% energy to the hero that deals the final hit.
7
Chosen by the Stars
After a Meteor Shower, all Healers gain a buff that increases all healing dealt by 100% for the duration of 7 seconds.
10
Survivor's Willpower
Defeating a Nightmare generated by Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions grants a 10-second 100% Vampirism aura to the entire team.

Marksman Opportunity
If a Marksman uses their ultimate while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active, they will recover 20% energy over 5 seconds.

Immortal Hero
The hero that deals the most damage while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active gains Immortality for 7 seconds.
3
Astral Shield
Triggers an Astral Shield once per battle. The Shield absorbs all damage from Defense Sphere explosions in the Wormhole. The Shield is triggered automatically when 3 or more Defense Spheres enter the Wormhole.
+10%
Nightmare's Energy
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the hero that generates the Nightmare gains 10% energy for damage dealt to it.
+10%
Keeper's Blessing
When Osh the Eternal Keeper awakens, the hero that dealt the most damage before the Planet Parade began will gain 10% more stats.
4
Insomnia
A single use of Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions can't unleash more than 4 Nightmares.
+25%
Healing Converter
25% of healing exceeding heroes' max health is converted into pure damage dealt to Defense Spheres.
-50%
Mage's Vigilance
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the Nightmares generated by Mages have 50% less health.

92.3K142K101K88.8K160K108K692K1502.49M80.83%0.49%
+25%
Wakeful Undead
Grants a permanent buff if there are three Undead on the team. Each team member has a 25% chance not to fall asleep while Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is active.
+4%
Ingenious Engineers
Grants a permanent buff if there are three Engineers on the team. Each team member deals 4% bonus damage to the Stardome.
+25%
Dreamer's Retaliation
All heroes on the team deal 25% bonus damage against Nightmares for each Nightmare on the battlefield.
+15%
Resilient Grove Keeper
Grants a permanent buff if there are three Grove Keepers on the team. Each team member has a 15% chance to avoid damage when Defense Spheres collide with the Wormhole.
+25%
Healing Converter
25% of healing exceeding heroes' max health is converted into pure damage dealt to Defense Spheres.

+25%
Dreamer's Retaliation
All heroes on the team deal 25% bonus damage against Nightmares for each Nightmare on the battlefield.
+5%
Sphere Energy Unleashed
Destroying a Defense Sphere grants 5% energy to the hero that deals the final hit.
10
Survivor's Willpower
Defeating a Nightmare generated by Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions grants a 10-second 100% Vampirism aura to the entire team.
7
Chosen by the Stars
After a Meteor Shower, all Healers gain a buff that increases all healing dealt by 100% for the duration of 7 seconds.
-10%
Stellar Tank Resilience
Tank heroes take 10% less damage from Defense Sphere basic attacks.
7
Immortal Hero
The hero that deals the most damage while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active gains Immortality for 7 seconds.
+10%
Keeper's Blessing
When Osh the Eternal Keeper awakens, the hero that dealt the most damage before the Planet Parade began will gain 10% more stats.
+10%
Nightmare's Energy
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the hero that generates the Nightmare gains 10% energy for damage dealt to it.
+20%
Marksman Opportunity
If a Marksman uses their ultimate while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active, they will recover 20% energy over 5 seconds.
+25%
Healing Converter
25% of healing exceeding heroes' max health is converted into pure damage dealt to Defense Spheres.
-50%
Mage's Vigilance
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the Nightmares generated by Mages have 50% less health.

130
130
130
130

+15%
Jumpstart
All heroes enter combat with 15% Energy.
+60%
Meteors of Haste
While Meteor Shower is active, all heroes boost their speed by 60%.
+5%
Sphere Energy Unleashed
Destroying a Defense Sphere grants 5% energy to the hero that deals the final hit.

Immortal Hero
The hero that deals the most damage while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active gains Immortality for 7 seconds.
3
Astral Shield
Triggers an Astral Shield once per battle. The Shield absorbs all damage from Defense Sphere explosions in the Wormhole. The Shield is triggered automatically when 3 or more Defense Spheres enter the Wormhole.
+25%
Healing Converter
25% of healing exceeding heroes' max health is converted into pure damage dealt to Defense Spheres.
+10%
Keeper's Blessing
When Osh the Eternal Keeper awakens, the hero that dealt the most damage before the Planet Parade began will gain 10% more stats.

Mage's Vigilance

+10%
Nightmare's Energy
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the hero that generates the Nightmare gains 10% energy for damage dealt to it.
4
Insomnia
A single use of Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions can't unleash more than 4 Nightmares.
+25%
Dreamer's Retaliation
All heroes on the team deal 25% bonus damage against Nightmares for each Nightmare on the battlefield.
-6%
Defense Sphere Override
Weakens the basic attacks of Defense Spheres by 6%.
+6%
Defense Sphere Destroyer
Boosts damage dealt to Defense Spheres by 6%.

A single use of Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions can't unleash more than 4 Nightmares.
7
Immortal Hero
The hero that deals the most damage while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active gains Immortality for 7 seconds.
+20%
Marksman Opportunity
If a Marksman uses their ultimate while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active, they will recover 20% energy over 5 seconds.
-10%
Stellar Tank Resilience
Tank heroes take 10% less damage from Defense Sphere basic attacks.
Kolm
130
130
130
130
130
130
118K63.7K121K82.6K113K64.7K563K160229K0.96%0.05%
+100%
Meteors of Haste
While Meteor Shower is active, all heroes boost their speed by 100%.
+25%
Dreamer's Retaliation
All heroes on the team deal 25% bonus damage against Nightmares for each Nightmare on the battlefield.
7
Chosen by the Stars
After a Meteor Shower, all Healers gain a buff that increases all healing dealt by 100% for the duration of 7 seconds.
10
Survivor's Willpower
Defeating a Nightmare generated by Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions grants a 10-second 100% Vampirism aura to the entire team.
3
Astral Shield
Triggers an Astral Shield once per battle. The Shield absorbs all damage from Defense Sphere explosions in the Wormhole. The Shield is triggered automatically when 3 or more Defense Spheres enter the Wormhole.
+25%
Healing Converter
25% of healing exceeding heroes' max health is converted into pure damage dealt to Defense Spheres.
-50%
Mage's Vigilance
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the Nightmares generated by Mages have 50% less health.
+10%
Nightmare's Energy
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the hero that generates the Nightmare gains 10% energy for damage dealt to it.
+10%
Keeper's Blessing
When Osh the Eternal Keeper awakens, the hero that dealt the most damage before the Planet Parade began will gain 10% more stats.
4
Insomnia
A single use of Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions can't unleash more than 4 Nightmares.
7
Immortal Hero
The hero that deals the most damage while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active gains Immortality for 7 seconds.
+20%
Marksman Opportunity
If a Marksman uses their ultimate while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active, they will recover 20% energy over 5 seconds.
-10%
Stellar Tank Resilience
Tank heroes take 10% less damage from Defense Sphere basic attacks.

Resilient Grove Keeper
Grants a permanent buff if there are three Grove Keepers on the team. Each team member has a 15% chance to avoid damage when Defense Spheres collide with the Wormhole.

+5%
Sphere Energy Unleashed
Destroying a Defense Sphere grants 5% energy to the hero that deals the final hit.
+25%
Wakeful Undead
Grants a permanent buff if there are three Undead on the team. Each team member has a 25% chance not to fall asleep while Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is active.
+25%
Dreamer's Retaliation
All heroes on the team deal 25% bonus damage against Nightmares for each Nightmare on the battlefield.

Destroying a Defense Sphere grants 5% energy to the hero that deals the final hit.
+25%
Dreamer's Retaliation
All heroes on the team deal 25% bonus damage against Nightmares for each Nightmare on the battlefield.
-10%
Stellar Tank Resilience
Tank heroes take 10% less damage from Defense Sphere basic attacks.
7
Chosen by the Stars
After a Meteor Shower, all Healers gain a buff that increases all healing dealt by 100% for the duration of 7 seconds.
+25%
Healing Converter
25% of healing exceeding heroes' max health is converted into pure damage dealt to Defense Spheres.

Marksman Opportunity

Healing Converter
25% of healing exceeding heroes' max health is converted into pure damage dealt to Defense Spheres.
7
Chosen by the Stars
After a Meteor Shower, all Healers gain a buff that increases all healing dealt by 100% for the duration of 7 seconds.
+10%
Keeper's Blessing
When Osh the Eternal Keeper awakens, the hero that dealt the most damage before the Planet Parade began will gain 10% more stats.
+20%
Marksman Opportunity
If a Marksman uses their ultimate while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active, they will recover 20% energy over 5 seconds.
-10%
Stellar Tank Resilience
Tank heroes take 10% less damage from Defense Sphere basic attacks.
10
Survivor's Willpower
Defeating a Nightmare generated by Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions grants a 10-second 100% Vampirism aura to the entire team.
3
Astral Shield
Triggers an Astral Shield once per battle. The Shield absorbs all damage from Defense Sphere explosions in the Wormhole. The Shield is triggered automatically when 3 or more Defense Spheres enter the Wormhole.
7
Immortal Hero
The hero that deals the most damage while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active gains Immortality for 7 seconds.

+15%
Defense Sphere Destroyer
Boosts damage dealt to Defense Spheres by 15%.
-15%
Wormhole Suppressor
Decreases damage dealt by the Wormhole and Wormhole Generator skills by 15%.
+100%
Meteors of Haste
While Meteor Shower is active, all heroes boost their speed by 100%.
+25%
Jumpstart
All heroes enter combat with 25% Energy.
+25%
Wakeful Undead
Grants a permanent buff if there are three Undead on the team. Each team member has a 25% chance not to fall asleep while Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is active.

+10%
Nightmare's Energy
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the hero that generates the Nightmare gains 10% energy for damage dealt to it.
+25%
Healing Converter
25% of healing exceeding heroes' max health is converted into pure damage dealt to Defense Spheres.
+5%
Sphere Energy Unleashed
Destroying a Defense Sphere grants 5% energy to the hero that deals the final hit.

+10%
Keeper's Blessing
When Osh the Eternal Keeper awakens, the hero that dealt the most damage before the Planet Parade began will gain 10% more stats.
-50%
Mage's Vigilance
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the Nightmares generated by Mages have 50% less health.
-15%
Defense Sphere Override
Weakens the basic attacks of Defense Spheres by 15%.

Grants a permanent buff if there are three Undead on the team. Each team member has a 25% chance not to fall asleep while Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is active.
+20%
Marksman Opportunity
If a Marksman uses their ultimate while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active, they will recover 20% energy over 5 seconds.
3
Astral Shield
Triggers an Astral Shield once per battle. The Shield absorbs all damage from Defense Sphere explosions in the Wormhole. The Shield is triggered automatically when 3 or more Defense Spheres enter the Wormhole.
+10%
Nightmare's Energy
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the hero that generates the Nightmare gains 10% energy for damage dealt to it.
+25%
Healing Converter
25% of healing exceeding heroes' max health is converted into pure damage dealt to Defense Spheres.
+5%
Sphere Energy Unleashed
Destroying a Defense Sphere grants 5% energy to the hero that deals the final hit.
+25%
Dreamer's Retaliation
All heroes on the team deal 25% bonus damage against Nightmares for each Nightmare on the battlefield.
-10%
Stellar Tank Resilience
Tank heroes take 10% less damage from Defense Sphere basic attacks.
10
Survivor's Willpower
Defeating a Nightmare generated by Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions grants a 10-second 100% Vampirism aura to the entire team.
+10%
Keeper's Blessing
When Osh the Eternal Keeper awakens, the hero that dealt the most damage before the Planet Parade began will gain 10% more stats.
-50%
Mage's Vigilance
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the Nightmares generated by Mages have 50% less health.
-15%
Defense Sphere Override
Weakens the basic attacks of Defense Spheres by 15%.
